(1) 罰款不超過一萬或監禁不超過三個月（註：緩刑亦屬監禁）
(2) 在此以前不曾被定罪；及
(3) 經過3年時間並未再被定罪。

(1) Any person who is reasonably suspected by an official of committing or attempting to commit any breach of these by-laws, while in or upon any part of the railway premises shall, when required to do so by such official-
(a) give to that official true and correct particulars of his name and address and of his telephone number, if any, and produce proof to that effect for inspection; and

(1A) No person shall wilfully-
(a) fail to comply with a requirement under paragraph (1); or
(b) in complying or attempting to comply with a requirement under paragraph (1)(a), give false particulars of his name, address or telephone number or particulars of his name, address or telephone number that are misleading in a material particular.
(2) Every official shall have the power to remove (if necessary by the use of reasonable force) from the railway premises any person whom he reasonably suspects of having committed, or attempting to commit any breach of these by-laws; without prejudice to any penalty or surcharge which may be imposed in accordance with these by-laws and in the case where such breach is an offence as herein provided he shall have power to detain such person until he can be delivered into the custody of a police officer to be dealt with according to law.
